case_title: CANTOR, CHRISTOPHER VS S.F. POLICE DEPT/HEATHER FONG/CITY OF S.F.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CANTOR, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. POLICE DEPT/HEATHER FONG/CITY OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. POLICE DEPT/HEATHER FONG/CITY OF S.F.
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-28-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-19-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-30-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-04-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BY COURT ORDER TO 6/4/07 AT 3:30 P.M. JUDGE CONWAY RECUSED HIMSELF. THE JUDGE BELIEVES HIS RECUSAL WOULD FURTHER THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANTOR, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S.F. POLICE DEPT/HEATHER FONG/CITY OF S.F. $445.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00, DEFENDANT HEATHER FONG DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE TOW OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE WAS NOT AUTHORIZED UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS USAGE; THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGE INCIDENT TO THE TOW. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, FEE EXEMPT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-15-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-28-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF SUIT AGAINST CHIEF FONG AND DEFENDANT'S(CITY'S) BRIEF FILED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
SUBPENA(TECUM)PROOF OF SRVC ON:S.F.POLICE DEPT. FILED.
NOTICE OF DEFECTIVE SERVICE OF SUMMONS FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SF.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-19-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-23-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANTS MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE, GRANTED. CONTINUE TO 2/23/07 AT 10:00 A.M. PLAINTIFF SHALL EFFECT SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO DEFT S.F. POLICE DEPT ETC RETURNED UNDELIVERED. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-23-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-30-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COURT ORDERS THIS CASE SET FOR TRIAL ON 4/30/07 AT 3:30 P.M. IN COMPLAINCE WITH PLAINTIFF'S SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM, DEFENDANT SHALL PRODUCE AT TRIAL A COPY OF ANY INVESTIGATIVE REPORTS, INCIDENT
BASIS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO S.F POLICE DEPT.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SF POLICE DEPT/CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS.
